title: Extended Waystones
description: Adds Wooden & Framed waystone variants, and supports coloring the text!
body:
# Extended Waystones - ![Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/extended-waystones)
This mod simply adds more waystone variants to the [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) mod, and allows you to dye the displayed text - with support for [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot)!

A copyright disclaimer is included at the bottom of this page.

All variants added:
- Acacia Waystone
- Birch Waystone
- Cherry Waystone
- Dark Oak Waystone
- Jungle Waystone
- Mangrove Waystone
- Oak Waystone
- Spruce Waystone
- Acacia Framed Waystone
- Birch Framed Waystone
- Cherry Framed Waystone
- Dark Oak Framed Waystone
- Jungle Framed Waystone
- Mangrove Framed Waystone
- Oak Framed Waystone
- Spruce Framed Waystone

## Framed Variants
![Framed Waystones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2rpsc2h0/images/cbd3f01a2a0bde6a4ecd310e4aeb9a0849bf57aa.png)

## Wooden Variants
![Wooden Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2rpsc2h0/images/bce9f298048f37a47f58d8c6a22461babb721f3d.png)

## Colored Overlay
_Colors also work with the Framed & Wooden variants, and also supports Dye Depot colors_
![Colored Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2rpsc2h0/images/ab4486f1eb7801a4c70df5405e9da0e273d7c6e8.png)

## Names
Yes, this can be called my many names
- Extended Waystones
- Waystone Variants
- More Waystones
- Wooden Waystones
- Extra Waystones

The list goes on!

## Copyright Disclaimer
This is an unofficial addon for the Waystones mod.
It is not affiliated with or endorsed by [BlayTheNinth](https://modrinth.com/user/BlayTheNinth).

This mod **requires** the [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) mod by BlayTheNinth.

This addon uses Mixins to modify certain runtime behaviors of the Waystones mod. No Waystones files are included or redistributed.

All rights to the original [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) mod belong to [BlayTheNinth](https://modrinth.com/user/BlayTheNinth).
